seo.title: Warranty | San Juan Fiberglass Pools — Maxima Pools
seo.description: The San Juan fiberglass pool shell warranty: 25-year structural and 10-year surface coverage, exclusions, manufacturer duties, and how to keep your coverage active.
seo.ogTitle: San Juan Fiberglass Pool Warranty | Maxima Pools
seo.ogDescription: 25-year structural and 10-year surface warranty on San Juan fiberglass pool shells — coverage, exclusions, and buyer action items.

hero.subtitle: The official San Juan fiberglass pool shell warranty — what's covered, what voids it, and the steps to keep your coverage active.

items.label: Structural Warranty
items.description: Covers pool shell leaks caused solely by structural failure due to faulty workmanship or manufacturing materials.

items.label: Surface Warranty
items.description: Covers the Gelcoat/Iridium finish against staining, discoloration, or excessive fading due to material defects. (Does not cover natural sun/chemical fading, which can be restored via professional polishing.)

exclusions.heading: What Voids the Warranty
exclusions.intro: This warranty becomes null and void if any of the following occur:

items.title: Unauthorized Draining
items.description: WARNING: Water levels must never drop below the skimmer outlet. Ground pressure can crack or buckle an empty shell. Draining must only be done by a licensed professional.

items.title: Neglect & Improper Chemistry
items.description: Failure to maintain water balance within standard parameters or follow the official Pool Maintenance Manual.

items.title: Unauthorized Repairs / Alterations
items.description: Any structural changes or repairs made by anyone other than the specific San Juan manufacturer.

items.title: External Forces
items.description: Damage from ground shifting, floods, earthquakes, accidents, misuse, or improper dealer installation/handling.

items.title: Surroundings & Third-Party Equipment
items.description: Decks (concrete, wood, masonry), coping, pumps, filters, or accessories from other suppliers.

items.title: Remedy
items.description: San Juan will, at its sole discretion, either repair or replace a defective shell.

items.title: Liability Limits
items.description: Coverage extends to the pool shell only. San Juan is not responsible for water or chemical replacement, damage to landscaping, fencing, decks, or any incidental, special, or consequential damages.

buyerActions.heading: How to Keep Your Coverage Active

items.title: Registration
items.description: The Warranty Registration Card must be completed, signed, and returned within 10 days of purchase to activate coverage.

items.title: Maintenance
items.description: The buyer must request, read, and strictly follow the care instructions found at www.sanjuanpools.com.

items.title: Claims
items.description: Defects must be reported via registered mail to the manufacturing plant within 15 days for structural issues (subject to a $75.00 trip fee per visit) or within 5 days for surface issues.

plants.heading: Where Claims Are Handled
plants.note: This document constitutes the exclusive warranty. No dealer or agent representations can alter these terms. This warranty gives you specific legal rights, which vary by state.

cta.heading: Questions about your warranty?
cta.body: Our team is happy to walk you through coverage and registration for your San Juan fiberglass pool.
